key_insights.insight: Hormonal birth control suppresses ovulation and lowers estrogen, which can decrease libido in women.
key_insights.quote: When you do that what happens when youflatline a woman's own production of hormones and replacethem with a daily dose of synthetic progesterone, this does a few things towomen's sexual psychology.

key_insights.insight: Women's attraction preferences shift across their menstrual cycle, with a heightened interest in testosterone-related cues near ovulation.
key_insights.quote: During this time what they also found is that women's preference for testosteronelevels in the faces of the men they preferred also increased.

key_insights.insight: Men are generally more willing to make the trade-offs necessary to reach CEO-level positions due to their evolved psychology tied to mate attraction and resource acquisition.
key_insights.quote: One of the reasons, not the only reason, but certainly one of the reasons that we see thatmore men tend to be in positions of being a CEO, for example, is because oftentimesmen are more willing to make the tradeoffs that you have to make to get into those positions because men are wired that way.

key_insights.insight: Women are more competitive with other women who are considered beautiful, as physical attractiveness is a primary dimension in mate selection.
key_insights.quote: Oh, women are more competitive with beautiful women. I mean, there's just no question about that.And the reason for this is that given that this is something that men desire in their partners,this is the primary dimension by which women compete for access to partners.

key_insights.insight: Women on hormonal birth control may experience a blunted cortisol response to stress, similar to those with PTSD.
key_insights.quote: For womenwho are using hormonal birth control,that you get a blunted or absent cortisolresponse to stress.And this is the sort of thing that we tend to seein people who've experienced PTSD or trauma.

key_insights.insight: The birth control pill can significantly increase the risk of depression and suicide attempts, especially in teenage girls.
key_insights.quote: Especially for teenage girls,going on hormonal birth control can significantlyincrease your risk of developing a mental health disorderand significantly increase your risk of attempting or being successful at suicide.

key_insights.insight: Women's preference for partners with resources contributes to men working harder to control those resources, which can manifest as the patriarchy.
key_insights.quote: Because the reason that men tend to controla lot of resources is because women demand resource accesson the part of their partners.And if women didn't care, then men wouldn't work so hard to get access to them.

key_insights.insight: Men's mate value can be increased by demonstrating a willingness to commit, particularly to women seeking long-term relationships.
key_insights.quote: You can increase your value to herjust by being willing to invest.By being willing, because women desire that,because women generally place a priority on somebody's willingnessto stick around and to continue to invest resources in just her, you can increase yourvalue from a seven to a nine or a 10 just by virtue of being willing to commit.

actionable_advice.advice: Men, build muscle and strive for access to resources and status to be more attractive to potential partners.
actionable_advice.how_to: Go to the gym to naturally increase testosterone levels. Also, study and work hard to do well financially and ascend the status hierarchy.

actionable_advice.advice: Women considering birth control, be aware of the potential impact on mood, libido, and partner preferences.
actionable_advice.how_to: Research the various types of birth control and their effects before making a decision. Discuss alternative non-hormonal options like the copper IUD with your doctor.

actionable_advice.advice: Men, be understanding that your female partner's libido can be impacted by hormonal birth control, which can also affect her attraction towards you
actionable_advice.how_to: Be aware that when she stops taking the pill, it can also influence her attraction towards you and do what you can do increase your perceived value as a provider or demonstrate willingness to commit

actionable_advice.advice: Men, if you're seeking a long-term relationship, cultivate "nice guy" attributes like willingness to invest and commitment.
actionable_advice.how_to: Demonstrate genuine interest in a woman's well-being, support her goals, and communicate a desire for a committed future together.

memorable_stories: Guest recounts their personal experience of 'waking up' after discontinuing hormonal birth control, experiencing heightened emotions and increased libido.
The host shares a story about his ex-partner losing her libido while on hormonal birth control, highlighting the impact on relationships.
The discussion of the study where attractive models approached strangers on campus, requesting a date, a visit to their apartment, or sex to demonstrate sex differences in opportunism.
contrarian_claims: The birth control pill, while instrumental for women's independence, may also have significant negative impacts on women's emotions, libido, and attraction preferences.
The patriarchy exists because women desire resources in their partners and, without that desire, men would not work so hard to obtain them.
Women don't necessarily prefer men with high status and, social dominance in the same way that men prefer women high in fertility. High status may even detract from women's attractiveness.
The best birth control isn't necessarily hormonal due to the far reaching impacts synthetic hormones have on mood, muscle mass, etc.
Men's lowered testosterone levels may be impacted by care giving duties for children or their partners taking hormonal birth control.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Oestrogen Expert: Birth Control Changes Who You Are...Would You Still Love Them If You Came Off It?! Oestrogen Makes You More Attractive!
